summary: Reframed the opening around Leela's queue reservation so the chapter enters on a distinct focal point from the adjacent room-atmosphere opening, and tightened the final sentence so the unanswered silence carries more cleanly into the next chapter's public-room tension.
edits: Shifted the opening focus from the lab's temperature inventory to the whiteboard reservation block, then moved the room-pressure description after it.
Adjusted the closing sentence to cast Leela's silence as something that follows her into shared rooms.
